name: greymoth-devkit
description: The shared engine behind greymoth's tools: deterministic rules in, a shareable verdict card out. Zero-LLM, zero-network.
author: greymoth <m.hirakawa07@icloud.com>

scripts.build: tsc -p packages/tokens/tsconfig.json && node packages/tokens/scripts/gen-css.mjs && tsc -p packages/rules-core/tsconfig.json && tsc -p packages/scorecard/tsconfig.json && tsc -p packages/sharecard/tsconfig.json
